title: boechera shortii
intro: Boechera shortii, also known as Short's rockcress, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, attributed to its high concentration of isothiocyanates. The plant has been used to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Boechera shortii can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often made by combining the plant's leaves and flowers with other herbs or using them as a standalone remedy.
